'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 5''' was the fifth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[January 30]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[David Bailey]], [[Chris Gardner]], and [[Iain Lowson]]. It also contained an original illustration by [[Carl Lyons]].

==Contents==
:'''Battles & Events''':
:*[[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|The Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]] {{C|CAR 1-4}}
:**<small>Jabba the Hutt prepares an execution at the lair of the deadly Sarlacc.</small>
:'''Characters''': 
:*[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] {{C|JAR 1-4}}
:**<small>The bumbling Gungan who was exiled by his own people.</small>
:*[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] {{C|THR 1-4}}
:**<small>Alien leader of the Imperial forces after the death of the Emperor.</small>
:'''Planets & Locations''': 
:*[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] {{C|BES 1-4}}
:**<small>Great gas Giant where life has evolved among the drifting clouds.</small>
:'''Droids''': 
:*[[Droideka/Legends|Droideka]] - Destroyer Droids {{C|DRO 1-2}}
:**<small>The Trade Federation's super-fast, heavily armed destroyer droids.</small>
:'''Weapons & Technology''': 
:*[[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] {{C|HYP 1-2}}
:**<small>The secrets of faster-than-light travel via hyperspace jumps.</small>
:'''Vehicles''': 
:*[[Scimitar/Legends|Sith Infiltrator]] {{C|SIT 1-2}}
:**<small>Darth Maul's stealthy and formidably equipped starship.</small>
